properties.query:
AzureDiagnostics
| where ResourceType == "AZUREFIREWALLS"
| where Category == "AZFWThreatIntel"
| where Action_s == "Allow"
| summarize startTime=min(TimeGenerated),endTime=max(TimeGenerated),EventCount = count() by SourceIP, DestinationIp_s,ThreatDescription_s, Action_s
properties.description: CC-FW-003-T1071 Comunicación aceptada entrante contra IP maliciosa
properties.displayName: [SEGITTUR] CC-FW-003-T1071 Comunicación aceptada entrante contra IP maliciosa
